sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, dt String, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, toDateTime64OrZero(dt, 3) AS dt_converted FROM test_dates WHERE toDateTime64OrZero(dt, 3) > toDateTime64OrZero('1970-01-01 01:00:00', 3);
SELECT id, toDateTime64OrZero(dt, 3) AS dt_converted FROM test_dates WHERE dt_converted > 0;
SELECT id, dt, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY toDateTime64OrZero(dt, 3) ORDER BY id) AS count_by_dt FROM test_dates;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, value1 UInt32, value2 String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT t1.id, t2.value1 FROM test_dates AS t1 JOIN test_join AS t2 ON toDateTime64OrZero(t1.dt, 3) > toDateTime64OrZero(t2.value2, 3);
SELECT id, (toDateTime64OrZero(dt, 3) - toDateTime64OrZero('1970-01-01 01:00:00', 3)) as dt_diff FROM test_dates HAVING dt_diff > 0;
SELECT id, dt, toDateTime64OrZero(dt, 3) AS converted_dt FROM test_dates ORDER BY converted_dt DESC LIMIT 5;
